channel.title: Worker-Pools on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Worker-Pools on Systology

item.title: Service Resilience
item.description: Design patterns for reliable microservice behavior under load; implementing strict request idempotency, non-blocking async I/O, robust circuit breakers, durable background queues, and observability.

item.title: Video Transcoding & Streaming Pipeline
item.description: An inherently scalable video ingestion and transcoding system architecture; asynchronously chunking heavy media, extracting actionable features, and steadily outputting adaptive bitrates via worker pools.
